## Validation

- [ ] `make public-release-check` passes locally
- [ ] New or changed scripts have unit tests in `skills/biosymphony/tests/`
- [ ] Examples use public, synthetic, or placeholder data
- [ ] No raw or heavy biological data added to the tree
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, provider IDs, or local workstation paths

## Mission or campaign context

If this change is driven by a real campaign, name the route and claim ceiling it serves. If it's a generic skill or doc improvement, note that.
